name: Mydei / Highschool Crush
description:
﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌

Highschool AU

You decided to write a confession letter to your crush, Mydei.

It didn't go as planned, however.

─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──

This scenario is inspired by the song ''dreamin chuchu'' by emon!!
